MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Ruth Abrahamsis present. Represented by Knowl Radcliff.
Attorney, David Foran, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Behnam Zadinejad, is present.
Attorney, Gary Wlliams , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-28-2010 is vacated.
